content: Popular budgeting apps (YNAB, Monarch, Copilot) share core features: transaction tracking, category-based budgeting, spending dashboards, and reporting. YNAB uses zero-based/envelope budgeting with manual intentionality. Copilot focuses on AI automation - auto-categorization, spending alerts, forecasting. Monarch offers flexible budgeting methods, net worth tracking, investment monitoring, and household collaboration. Mint shut down in late 2023. All require subscription fees (-120/year).
